# Official Transvoxel Upstream

Source:

```text
https://github.com/EricLengyel/Transvoxel
```

Pinned revision:

```text
51a494f03c5b024cd153b596bcc7152eb3cc93a6
```

Imported files:

| File | SHA-256 of imported bytes |
| --- | --- |
| `Transvoxel.cpp` | `83a5511346b54c42e4e66dec916d3971c92f4fbda1c7878cbad5901a820dcab4` |
| `LICENSE` | `83e1991655f02148e22ef93de107f45fac4ffea573ce59df154a1546333fab39` |

`Transvoxel.cpp` is retained byte-for-byte from the pinned Windows checkout,
including its original CRLF line endings. It contains official algorithm data
tables, not a complete terrain engine.

Do not edit these files. Project code accesses them only through the adapter in
`src/backend/`.
